headline: P&L exposure: ₹20 Cr direct remediation (engine estimate) + ₹13.8 Cr regulatory/reputational impact (engine estimate)
what_matters: Potential P/E compression of 0.1x as a result of ESG rating downgrades and reputational damage; margin erosion of 3.6 bps; direct revenue at risk of ₹2.5 Cr (engine estimate) if procurement exclusion occurs.
Tier 2/3 supply chain effects as child labor risks originate from coal suppliers in Jharkhand, requiring supplier audits, restructuring, and possible substitution.

Triggers BRSR Principle 5, GRI 408, and SEBI disclosure obligations; non-compliance risks SEBI penalties of ₹10 (engine estimate)-50 Cr per violation and mandatory remediation under Child Labour Prohibition Act.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹20 Cr direct remediation (engine estimate) + ₹13.8 Cr regulatory/reputational impact (engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: ₹2.5 Cr direct procurement exclusion risk (engine estimate)
